## Verification

- [ ] `python -m pytest -q`
- [ ] `ruff check --select E9,F63,F7,F82 .`
- [ ] Docker build completed, or the change does not affect the image

## Safety checklist

- [ ] I did not include tokens, API keys, logs, recordings, database files, or personal data
- [ ] I added or updated tests for behavior changes
- [ ] I updated README/docs for user-visible or configuration changes
- [ ] SQLite changes include an ordered migration and upgrade tests
- [ ] Screenshots are attached for admin-panel UI changes
